pivot_reason: ESP32 daemon verified operational with projection-only mode; sensor feedback layer not implemented because ESP32 firmware contains no sensor code. Pivot to validate LED projection system alone provides measurable engagement benefit.
validation_target: +20% operator situational awareness over 7-day period vs terminal-only monitoring (projection-only system)
prediction_falsification_condition: No statistically significant difference in engagement metrics between daemon-running and daemon-stopped periods after 7 days

daemon_status.simulation_mode_reason: ESP32 firmware rings.ino has NO physical sensors connected — only LED control
